summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI research execution system. Dashboard, planning flow, workspace with resizable panels, React Flow graphs, rich text editor with AI actions, and export functionality all working well. One minor issue with planning flow plan generation API call timing out.

ui_bugs.issue: Plan generation API call appears to timeout or take too long, causing user to get stuck at 'Generating your research plan...' step

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with Welcome message and Create New Project CTA
Dashboard shows project cards with status and progress indicators
Dashboard displays stats summary (Projects, Papers Found, Documents, Tasks Done)
Clicking Create New Project opens guided planning flow
Planning flow has 5 steps with progress indicator
Planning flow steps 1-4 work correctly (research goal, output type, audience, scope)
Workspace shows resizable 3-panel layout (Navigator, Workspace, Inspector)
Task Graph tab displays and React Flow loads successfully
Agent Graph tab displays and React Flow loads successfully
Rich text editor loads with content and AI Actions dropdown
AI Actions dropdown shows all 4 options (Rewrite, Expand, Summarize, Add Citations)
Export button works and shows format options (Markdown, HTML, DOCX)
Theme toggle works and changes UI theme
Status bar shows task counts and project info
Navigator shows all sections (Projects, Tasks, Documents, Literature)
Inspector shows metadata and project information
Execute Pipeline button is present and clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix planning flow plan generation API timeout issue - the /api/planning/generate-plan endpoint appears to be taking too long or timing out, preventing users from completing the project creation flow
